headline: Cava launches hiring push to add 2,500 team members
summary: The fast-casual chain plans to open 75 restaurants this year, and has created a "Flavor Your Future" initiative to promote career growth and move team members up the ladder.

raw.headline: Cava launches hiring push to add 2,500 team members
raw.summary: The fast-casual chain plans to open 75 restaurants this year, and has created a "Flavor Your Future" initiative to promote career growth and move team members up the ladder.

headline: A Look At Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Valuation As Recent Share Performance Softens
summary: Chipotle stock performance snapshot Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has drawn fresh attention as its stock trades around $29.27, with recent returns down over the past week, month and past 3 months, alongside weaker year to date and 1 year moves. headline: Chipotle (CMG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, Chipotle’s shares have sunk to $29.20, producing a disappointing 13.4% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 8% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Wall Street Just Downgraded Chipotle Stock. Here's What Investors Should Do Next.
summary: Chipotle stock isn't the restaurant darling it once was, but patient investors may be able to extract long-term gains.
